meta.title: OKTAFORCE Solutions
meta.description: Discover OKTAFORCE remote concierge modules, Smart View AI, resilient infrastructure, exclusive resident tools and premium support.
meta.keywords: oktaforce solutions, remote concierge, smart view, infrastructure, premium support

hero.title: Custom security and management solutions
hero.subtitle: Modern, flexible, efficient access control backed by tailored solutions, advanced technology and reliable support.

cta.title: Ready to build the ideal configuration?
cta.subtitle: Combine remote concierge, OKTAVISION and smart delivery modules in one tailored plan.

sections.title: Remote concierge with integrated AI
sections.headline: Continuous monitoring with dual verification and real-time response.
sections.description: Each entry is verified by AI and trained operators, reducing human error. Facial recognition, biometrics and an exclusive app ensure secure authentication.
bullets: Centralized screening with intelligent protocols for residents, visitors and service providers.
All access events are recorded with audio, video and auditable logs.
N+2 infrastructure with high availability and full redundancy.
Continuous, tailored and unobtrusive protection that matches the needs of your condominium.

sections.title: Proactive, preventive surveillance
sections.headline: Real-time behavioral analytics powered by advanced computer vision.
sections.description: Flags unusual motion, suspicious routes and abnormal loitering so automated protocols fire before a threat unfolds.
bullets: Heatmaps, alerts and an auditable decision trail in a strategic command dashboard.
End-to-end integration with sensors, alarms and AI-powered remote guarding.
Built for critical areas, exposed perimeters and high-traffic zones.
More than monitoring: anticipate and act with precision.

sections.title: Simplified logistics
sections.headline: Packages under control with solutions for every type of condo.
sections.description: Modular lockers with multiple compartments and digital tracking. Discreet, built-in Smart Drop ideal for gates and compact areas.
bullets: Automatic notifications in the OKTAFORCE app the moment a delivery arrives.
Full audit: every pickup leaves a visible, secure trail.
No lines, no lost packages, no intervention from the building manager or doorman.
More efficiency, less conflict: delivery the way it should be.

items.title: Dedicated engineering
items.description: Technical design, turnkey installation and go-live executed alongside our customer success team.

items.title: Continuous governance
items.description: Strategic reviews, executive reports and SLA dashboards shared with property managers and boards.

items.title: Contingency ready
items.description: N+2 redundancy, 24/7 on-call support and incident response protocols with certified partners.

features.name: Proprietary AI models trained on exclusive datasets
Real-time dashboard with SLA and audit trail
N+2 redundant command center with cloud backup
Local team and dedicated customer success per property
Certified integrations with ERPs and access control

savingsChart.title: Annual cost comparison
savingsChart.description: Based on a property with two lobbies and three shifts. Figures are estimated averages.
